pull_request.title: Bump org.openrewrite:rewrite-java from 8.72.3 to 8.72.4 in the openrewrite group
pull_request.body:
Bumps the openrewrite group with 1 update: [org.openrewrite:rewrite-java](https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite). Updates `org.openrewrite:rewrite-java` from 8.72.3 to 8.72.4
Release notes

Sourced from org.openrewrite:rewrite-java's releases.

v8.72.4

What's Changed

  • Optimize ChangePropertyKey by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6622
  • Maven annotation processor and plugin recipes should correctly handle parent and aggregator poms by @​MBoegers in openrewrite/rewrite#6546
  • Always refresh non-dated SNAPSHOTs in LocalMavenArtifactCache by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#6623
  • Keep trailing newlines in literal/folded YAML scalar values by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6612
  • Wrapping and braces style by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#6429
  • Support standalone Helm control flow directives in YAML parsing by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6625
  • Singleton precondition by @​sambsnyd in openrewrite/rewrite#6619
  • Handle asterisk placeholder values in YAML parser by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6626
  • Fix NPE in ProtoParser for malformed syntax declarations by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6627
  • Add DockerFrom trait for semantic Docker FROM analysis by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6620
  • Fix Groovy parser for closure parameters with default values by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6628
  • Fix Gradle AddDependency for matches only in test sources by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6637
  • Extending YAML DeleteProperty to also allow glob patterns. by @​steve-aom-elliott in openrewrite/rewrite#6639
  • Allow Gradle AddDependency to work with explicit configuration without Java sources by @​bmuschko in openrewrite/rewrite#6624
  • Fix TypeUtils#isAssignableToGeneric() by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6641
  • Add AddExplicitDependencyVersion visitor to explicitly set or remove dependency versions by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#6549
  • Add J.MemberReference support to ChangeMethodTargetToStatic by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6645
  • Add Docker recipes for best practices and security by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6640
  • Fix parsing of user-written @lombok.Generated annotations by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6638
  • Fix MergeYaml being unable to insert a scalar into a list that contains entries by @​sambsnyd in openrewrite/rewrite#6651
  • Fix vulnerability reports by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#6652
  • Resolve generic type variable identifiers in JavaTemplate output by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6642
  • Add recipes to find end-of-life & normalize Docker base images by @​timtebeek in openrewrite/rewrite#6649
  • Fix JSON parser idempotency issues with non-UTF-8 encoded files by @​MBoegers in openrewrite/rewrite#6635
  • Parent-load ParseErrorVisitor and JavadocVisitor by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6629
  • Do not pin managed versions from spring boot plugin by @​Jenson3210 in openrewrite/rewrite#6654
  • Python: Bump ty to 0.0.14 by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6655
  • Adding recipe AddCommentToProperty for YAML files by @​steve-aom-elliott in openrewrite/rewrite#6643
  • Fix MergeYaml adding extra newlines when the previous lines content already ended with a newline by @​sambsnyd in openrewrite/rewrite#6656
  • Improve performance of JavaTemplate$Matcher#find() by @​knutwannheden in openrewrite/rewrite#6657
  • Support Groovy method pointers and array constructor method references by @​jevanlingen in openrewrite/rewrite#5782

Full Changelog: https://github.com/openrewrite/rewrite/compare/v8.72.3...v8.72.4

Commits
  • 4a92ecf Support Groovy method pointers and array constructor method references (#5782)
  • 713fd62 Improve performance of JavaTemplate$Matcher#find() (#6657)
  • 9583110 Fix adding extra newlines (#6656)
  • 0bae806 Adding recipe AddCommentToProperty for YAML files (#6643)
  • 217f656 Python: Bump ty to 0.0.14 (#6655)
  • b64cfab Do not pin managed versions from spring boot plugin (#6654)
  • d8ad603 Update FindEndOfLifeImagesTest test expectations
  • 8994cfa Parent-load ParseErrorVisitor and JavadocVisitor (#6629)
  • e4b24da Small formatter optimization in StyleHelper
  • e1f6ad7 Fix JSON parser idempotency issues with non-UTF-8 encoded files (#6635)
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

[![Dependabot compatibility score](https://dependabot-badges.githubapp.com/badges/compatibility_score?dependency-name=org.openrewrite:rewrite-java&package-manager=maven&previous-version=8.72.3&new-version=8.72.4)](https://docs.github.com/en/github/managing-security-vulnerabilities/about-dependabot-security-updates#about-compatibility-scores) You can trigger a rebase of this PR by commenting `@dependabot rebase`. You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot show ignore conditions` will show all of the ignore conditions of the specified dependency - `@dependabot ignore major version` will close this group update PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for the specific dependency's major version (unless you unignore this specific dependency's major version or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore minor version` will close this group update PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for the specific dependency's minor version (unless you unignore this specific dependency's minor version or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore ` will close this group update PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for the specific dependency (unless you unignore this specific dependency or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot unignore ` will remove all of the ignore conditions of the specified dependency - `@dependabot unignore ` will remove the ignore condition of the specified dependency and ignore conditions
